---
title: "Security"
subtitle: "Proactive cybersecurity and NIS2 compliance for modern organizations"
description: "Blue Team cybersecurity operations, NIS2 Directive compliance, CISO as a Service, threat hunting, and incident response. Protect your organization with chen.ist."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        /* Apple Business-inspired clean design */
        .apple-section { padding: 5rem 0; }
        .apple-section-alt { padding: 5rem 0; background-color: #f5f5f7; }
        [data-bs-theme="dark"] .apple-section-alt { background-color: #1d1d1f; }
        .apple-hero { padding: 6rem 0 4rem; text-align: center; }
        .apple-hero h1 { font-size: 3.5rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
        .apple-hero p { font-size: 1.35rem; color: #86868b; max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto; }
        .apple-grid-item { text-align: center; padding: 2rem 1.5rem; }
        .apple-grid-item i { font-size: 2.5rem; color: var(--brand-green, #81BD4A); margin-bottom: 1rem; display: block; }
        .apple-grid-item h3 { font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
        .apple-grid-item p { font-size: 0.95rem; color: #86868b; }
        .apple-feature-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4rem; padding: 3rem 0; }
        .apple-feature-row.reverse { flex-direction: row-reverse; }
        .apple-feature-text h2 { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
        .apple-feature-text p { font-size: 1.1rem; color: #86868b; line-height: 1.6; }
        .apple-feature-img { flex: 0 0 45%; }
        .apple-feature-img img { width: 100%; border-radius: 12px; }
        .apple-link { color: var(--brand-green, #81BD4A); font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; }
        .apple-link:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
        .apple-link::after { content: " \2192"; }
        .apple-cta { text-align: center; padding: 5rem 0; }
        .apple-cta h2 { font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
        .apple-cta p { font-size: 1.1rem; color: #86868b; margin-bottom: 2rem; }
        .apple-btn { background-color: var(--brand-green, #81BD4A); color: white; padding: 0.75rem 2rem; border-radius: 50px; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; display: inline-block; transition: opacity 0.2s; }
        .apple-btn:hover { opacity: 0.85; color: white; text-decoration: none; }
        .apple-btn-outline { border: 2px solid var(--brand-green, #81BD4A); color: var(--brand-green, #81BD4A); padding: 0.75rem 2rem; border-radius: 50px; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; display: inline-block; transition: all 0.2s; }
        .apple-btn-outline:hover { background-color: var(--brand-green, #81BD4A); color: white; text-decoration: none; }
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
          .apple-hero h1 { font-size: 2.25rem; }
          .apple-feature-row, .apple-feature-row.reverse { flex-direction: column; gap: 2rem; }
          .apple-feature-img { flex: none; }
          .apple-feature-text h2 { font-size: 1.75rem; }
        }
        </style>
---

```{=html}
<!-- Hero -->
<div class="apple-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Secure. Vigilant. Resilient.</h1>
    <p>Proactive Blue Team cybersecurity and NIS2 compliance to protect what matters most to your organization.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Services Grid -->
<div class="apple-section-alt">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="row">
      <div class="col-md-3 col-sm-6">
        <div class="apple-grid-item">
          <i class="bi bi-shield-check"></i>
          <h3>SOC Monitoring</h3>
          <p>24/7 real-time surveillance, threat detection, and expert analysis of your security environment.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-3 col-sm-6">
        <div class="apple-grid-item">
          <i class="bi bi-search"></i>
          <h3>Threat Hunting</h3>
          <p>Proactive identification of hidden threats and advanced persistent attackers in your network.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-3 col-sm-6">
        <div class="apple-grid-item">
          <i class="bi bi-clipboard-check"></i>
          <h3>NIS2 Compliance</h3>
          <p>End-to-end assessments, gap analysis, and compliance roadmaps for the NIS2 Directive.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-3 col-sm-6">
        <div class="apple-grid-item">
          <i class="bi bi-person-badge"></i>
          <h3>CISO as a Service</h3>
          <p>Strategic cybersecurity leadership, board reporting, and policy development on demand.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Feature 1: Blue Team Operations -->
<div class="apple-section">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="apple-feature-row">
      <div class="apple-feature-img">
        <img src="/assets/images/stock/server-room-dark.jpg" alt="Security Operations Center monitoring screens">
      </div>
      <div class="apple-feature-text">
        <h2>Blue Team Operations</h2>
        <p>Our Security Operations Center operates around the clock, delivering continuous monitoring, advanced threat detection, expert analysis, and rapid incident response. We focus on proactive defense strategies that strengthen your security posture before threats materialize.</p>
        <p>From real-time surveillance of your environment to forensic investigation of security events, our certified professionals ensure nothing goes unnoticed.</p>
        <a class="apple-link" href="/services/cybersecurity/">Explore cybersecurity services</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Feature 2: NIS2 Compliance -->
<div class="apple-section-alt">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="apple-feature-row reverse">
      <div class="apple-feature-img">
        <img src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.jpg" alt="NIS2 compliance monitoring dashboard">
      </div>
      <div class="apple-feature-text">
        <h2>NIS2 Compliance</h2>
        <p>The NIS2 Directive introduces stringent cybersecurity requirements for essential and important entities across the EU. Our comprehensive services guide you from initial scoping and gap analysis through to full compliance and continuous regulatory alignment.</p>
        <p>We deliver risk management framework assessments, supply chain security reviews, incident reporting capability evaluations, and actionable compliance roadmaps tailored to your sector.</p>
        <a class="apple-link" href="/services/nis2/">Explore NIS2 services</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Feature 3: Incident Response & Monitoring -->
<div class="apple-section">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="apple-feature-row">
      <div class="apple-feature-img">
        <img src="/assets/images/stock/server-racks.jpg" alt="Server infrastructure for security monitoring">
      </div>
      <div class="apple-feature-text">
        <h2>Incident Response &amp; Monitoring</h2>
        <p>Centralized log collection, advanced correlation analytics, and automated alerting give you complete visibility into your IT environment. When incidents occur, our structured response procedures minimize damage and recovery time.</p>
        <p>We cover preparation, detection, containment, eradication, recovery, and post-incident analysis, ensuring your organization meets NIS2 24-hour reporting requirements to authorities.</p>
        <a class="apple-link" href="/services/cybersecurity/#incident-response">Learn about incident response</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Process Steps -->
<div class="apple-section-alt">
  <div class="container" style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 2rem;">
    <h2 style="font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">How We Work</h2>
    <p style="font-size: 1.1rem; color: #86868b;">A proven four-phase approach to securing your organization.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="container">
    <div class="row">
      <div class="col-md-3 col-sm-6">
        <div class="apple-grid-item">
          <i class="bi bi-1-circle"></i>
          <h3>Discovery</h3>
          <p>Stakeholder interviews, documentation review, and scoping analysis to understand your environment and regulatory obligations.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-3 col-sm-6">
        <div class="apple-grid-item">
          <i class="bi bi-2-circle"></i>
          <h3>Assessment</h3>
          <p>Technical controls evaluation, risk management review, and gap identification against NIS2 requirements and industry standards.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-3 col-sm-6">
        <div class="apple-grid-item">
          <i class="bi bi-3-circle"></i>
          <h3>Implementation</h3>
          <p>Remediation of identified gaps, policy development, security controls deployment, and compliance program buildout.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-3 col-sm-6">
        <div class="apple-grid-item">
          <i class="bi bi-4-circle"></i>
          <h3>Monitoring</h3>
          <p>Continuous SOC monitoring, regular compliance reviews, threat hunting, and ongoing security posture optimization.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Who Needs This -->
<div class="apple-section">
  <div class="container" style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 2rem;">
    <h2 style="font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">Who Needs NIS2 Compliance?</h2>
    <p style="font-size: 1.1rem; color: #86868b;">The directive applies to entities across multiple critical sectors in the EU.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="container">
    <div class="row" style="gap: 0;">
      <div class="col-md-6" style="padding: 2rem;">
        <h3 style="font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 1.25rem;">Essential Entities</h3>
        <ul style="list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; color: #86868b; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 2.2;">
          <li>Energy (electricity, oil, gas, hydrogen)</li>
          <li>Transport (air, rail, water, road)</li>
          <li>Banking and financial market infrastructures</li>
          <li>Health sector</li>
          <li>Drinking water and wastewater</li>
          <li>Digital infrastructure</li>
          <li>Public administration</li>
          <li>Space</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-6" style="padding: 2rem;">
        <h3 style="font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 1.25rem;">Important Entities</h3>
        <ul style="list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; color: #86868b; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 2.2;">
          <li>Postal and courier services</li>
          <li>Waste management</li>
          <li>Chemicals production and distribution</li>
          <li>Food production and distribution</li>
          <li>Manufacturing (medical devices, electronics, machinery)</li>
          <li>Digital providers (cloud, data centers, CDNs, DNS)</li>
          <li>Research organizations</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="apple-section-alt">
  <div class="apple-cta">
    <div class="container">
      <h2>Ready to strengthen your security?</h2>
      <p>Talk to our team about cybersecurity operations, NIS2 compliance, or both.</p>
      <a class="apple-btn" href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" style="margin-right: 1rem;">Book a Consultation</a>
      <a class="apple-btn-outline" href="mailto:nis2@chen.ist">Email nis2@chen.ist</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
